---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new source, field, or capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like?
A clear description of what you want added or changed.

## Is this a new data source?
If yes, which platform? (e.g. IndiaMART, Sulekha, Yellow Pages, LinkedIn...)

## Why is this useful?
What use case does it solve? Who benefits?

## Any implementation ideas?
Optional — if you've looked at the page's DOM and have ideas, share them here.
